filename: DoEs OM dated 31.10.2025 on Appraisal and Approval of Schemes ending on 31st March 2026 and to be continued during the 16th Finance Commission Cycle - OOMF Info.pdf
text:
No. 01(01)/PFC-II/2025 (Pt.)

Government of India

Ministry of Finance

Department of Expenditure

Public Finance Central-I

Kartavya Bhawan-1, New Delhi

October, 2025

# OFFICE MEMORANDUM

# Subject: Appraisal and Approval of Schemes ending on 31st March 2026 and to be continued during the 16th Finance Commission Cycle - OOMF Info reg.

In order to monitor and review the achievements against the target indicators in the Output Outcome Monitoring Framework, henceforth, while issuing Meeting Notices for EFC Meetings in respect of Schemes that are to be continued in the 16th Finance Commission Cycle, the Divisions under Department of Expenditure shall ask for the following information from the concerned Ministries/Departments related to OOMF targets of all the Schemes of the Ministry/Department as contained in the Outcome Budget 2024-25 (Published in July 2024).

# Output: FY-2024-25

| Output | Indicator(s) | Target(s) 2024-25 | Achievement |
| ------ | ------------ | ----------------- | ----------- |

# Outcome: FY-2024-25

| Outcome | Indicator(s) | Target(s) 2024-25 | Achievement |
| ------- | ------------ | ----------------- | ----------- |

2. During FY 2026-27, the achievements of Outcome Budget 2025-26 will be reviewed and thereafter will change accordingly every FY.

3. This issues with the approval of the Secretary (Expenditure)

(Hema Jaiswal)

Deputy Director General (PFC-I & Policy)

email: hema.jais@nic.in

To,

i. AS(Pers), AS(PF-S), AS(PFC-I)

ii. JS(PFC-I), JS(PFC-II), JS(PFC-II)

iii. All Dir/ DS/JD of PF III/II

Copy to:

DG, DMEO - with a request to share the achievements of the Outcome Budget 2024-25.

JS (Budget), DEA.
